content: نَظَرياً دَه كَلاَم كُوَيِس جِدّاً بَسّ عَملياً صَعب اِلتَنفيذ
translations: eng:theoretically what you are saying is very good but in practice it is hard to do

transcriptions.arabizi: nazaryan dah kalaem kuwayis giddan bassaAamlyan saAb iltanfeez
